goal: Implement the three ucil-core skeleton submodules: core type system (types.rs), schema version tracking (schema_migration.rs), and OpenTelemetry stdout exporter (otel.rs).
plan_summary: All three features live in crates/ucil-core/ and share only the P0-W1-F01 prerequisite. Add the required Cargo dependencies (serde+derive, rusqlite, opentelemetry_sdk+opentelemetry-stdout). Create each submodule with real logic (no stubs, no todo!()), expose them from lib.rs as re-exports, and back each with unit tests that satisfy the exact cargo-test selectors in feature-list.json. Commit one module at a time (deps → impl → tests) to stay within the 50-line-per-commit target.
scope_in: crates/ucil-core/Cargo.toml — add workspace-pinned or inline deps: `serde` (features=["derive"]), `rusqlite` (features=["bundled"]), `opentelemetry` (API crate), `opentelemetry_sdk` (with `trace` feature), `opentelemetry-stdout` (with `trace` feature). All versions pinned; add to [workspace.dependencies] in root Cargo.toml if not already there.

crates/ucil-core/src/types.rs — define all seven public types with full fields: `QueryPlan` (intent, domains, sub_queries, knowledge_gaps, inferred_context, fallback_mode), `Symbol` (name, kind, file_path, line, col, language, doc_comment), `Diagnostic` (file_path, line, col, severity, code, message, source), `KnowledgeEntry` (id, symbol, content, embedding_vec, created_at, updated_at, meta), `ToolGroup` (id, name, tools, parallelism), `CeqpParams` (reason, target, session_id, branch, depth_limit, timeout_ms), `ResponseEnvelope` (request_id, tool_name, result, meta, degraded_plugins, indexing_status, otel_trace_id). Use `serde::{Serialize, Deserialize}` on all types. Use `#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]` where appropriate. Every public field documented with rustdoc.

crates/ucil-core/src/schema_migration.rs — implement: `pub const SCHEMA_VERSION: &str = "1.0.0"`, `pub fn stamp_version(db_path: &std::path::Path) -> Result<(), crate::schema_migration::MigrationError>` (opens/creates SQLite via rusqlite, creates `schema_versions` table if absent, inserts current SCHEMA_VERSION row with timestamp), `pub fn check_version(db_path: &std::path::Path) -> Result<(), crate::schema_migration::MigrationError>` (reads latest stamped version, returns `Err(MigrationError::Downgrade { ... })` if stamped version > SCHEMA_VERSION, else Ok). Define `pub enum MigrationError` with `thiserror::Error`.

crates/ucil-core/src/otel.rs — implement: `pub fn init_tracer() -> opentelemetry_sdk::trace::Tracer` that installs a `SimpleSpanProcessor` wired to `opentelemetry_stdout::SpanExporter`, sets the global tracer provider, and returns a named tracer (`ucil.core`). Also expose `pub fn shutdown_tracer()` that calls `global::shutdown_tracer_provider()`. No Jaeger, no OTLP. Stdout-only per phase-log invariant 8.

crates/ucil-core/src/lib.rs — add `pub mod types; pub mod schema_migration; pub mod otel;` declarations. Re-export key symbols: `pub use types::{QueryPlan, Symbol, Diagnostic, KnowledgeEntry, ToolGroup, CeqpParams, ResponseEnvelope}; pub use schema_migration::{SCHEMA_VERSION, MigrationError}; pub use otel::{init_tracer, shutdown_tracer};`.

Unit tests co-located in each module under `#[cfg(test)]`: types:: tests assert round-trip serde (JSON serialize/deserialize) for each struct and that Debug/Clone/PartialEq derive correctly. schema_migration:: tests use a tempfile-backed SQLite path to assert stamp_version creates the table and inserts a row, check_version returns Ok after stamping, and Downgrade error is returned when db has a newer-than-current version. otel:: tests call init_tracer(), create a span, record an attribute, end the span, then call shutdown_tracer() — asserts no panic throughout.
crates/ucil-core/Cargo.toml [dev-dependencies] — add `tempfile = "3"` for schema_migration tests that need a scratch directory.
scope_out: ucil init CLI command (P0-W1-F03 through F06) — depends on F02; scheduled for WO-0003.
CI YAML / GitHub Actions workflow (P0-W1-F08) — scheduled for its own WO.
Test fixtures rust/python/typescript/mixed projects (P0-W1-F11 through F14) — scheduled for WO-0004+.
Any logic in ucil-daemon, ucil-cli, ucil-treesitter, ucil-lsp-diagnostics, ucil-agents, ucil-embeddings — those crates remain stub shells.
OTLP or Jaeger exporter wiring — Phase 6 only (phase-log invariant 8).
Real SQLite migration scripts — P0 schema_migration is 'stamp + refuse downgrade' only; no actual schema DDL migrations.
Any field on the seven types beyond what is listed in scope_in — do not add speculative fields; type signatures are considered frozen once the verifier passes.
LanceDB, vector_store, incremental engine, fusion, CEQP evaluation logic — later phases.
acceptance: `cargo test -p ucil-core types::` exits 0 with at least one passing test per type (round-trip serde, Clone, PartialEq).
`cargo test -p ucil-core schema_migration::` exits 0: stamp creates table+row, check returns Ok after stamp, check returns Downgrade error for future version.
`cargo test -p ucil-core otel::` exits 0: init_tracer + span + shutdown completes without panic.
`cargo clippy -p ucil-core -- -D warnings` exits 0 (pedantic warnings included).
`cargo doc -p ucil-core --no-deps 2>&1 | grep -v '^$'` exits 0 with no broken intra-doc links.
`cargo build --workspace` exits 0 after adding new deps (no regressions in other crates).
context_refs: master-plan:§17 crates/ucil-core src/ file list (types.rs, schema_migration.rs, otel.rs)

phase-log:ucil-build/phase-log/00-phase-0/CLAUDE.md invariants 4–5 (no unwrap, lib.rs re-exports only), invariant 7 (F07 v1.0.0 stamp+refuse-downgrade), invariant 8 (F09 stdout only)

rules:.claude/rules/commit-style.md (one logical change per commit, ~50 lines diff, push after every commit)
